title: Hypothesis Testing Flowchart
description: A step-by-step visual guide to performing a test of significance, showing the decision-making process from stating hypotheses to drawing a conclusion.
elements: Make a Decision (Reject/Fail to Reject H₀)
relationships: Sequential flow from one element to the next, with a decision point after 'Determine Critical Value or P-value' that leads to either 'Reject H₀' or 'Fail to Reject H₀', both of which then feed into 'Draw Conclusion'
